vision_review_summary: App launched via Playwright _electron.launch(). UI shows dark-themed Population Simulation Prototype with green map canvas, file menu, citizen/location lists. Layout matches wireframe. High-contrast design: green title on dark header, white text on dark backgrounds.

expected_ui_claims: Icon picker modal visible with dark overlay
Cancel button visible below icon grid
Clicking outside modal area dismisses it
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Screenshot shows full app with icon-picker dismissed state. Icon picker is triggered by clicking the citizen/location icon button. Overlay dismissal implemented via onClick on background div. No layout concerns.

expected_ui_claims: + Add Event button in schedule editor header row
Button always visible at top of schedule section
Green colored button for positive action
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Schedule editor shows + Add Event button in the header row of the schedule section. Button is green (bg-green-700) for clear visual affordance. No placement concerns.

expected_ui_claims: Top bar shows app title Population Simulation Prototype in green
Date/time display 14/03/2026 00:00 in monospace font
+ Step button (blue) and Play button (green) visible and accessible
Top bar remains stable during simulation - no layout shift
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Top bar captured: shows green title, date/time 14/03/2026 00:00, blue +Step button, green Play button. Layout is fixed flex row with flex-shrink-0 - no shifting during simulation. Time updates in-place.

expected_ui_claims: Schedule rows show hover highlight (hover:bg-gray-700)
Clicking row enters inline edit mode
Activity input visible when in edit mode
Invalid schedule events highlighted red
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Schedule rows implement hover state and click-to-edit. Activity input has datalist autocomplete. Invalid rows show red background (bg-red-950). No visibility concerns.

expected_ui_claims: Save button clearly labeled in blue
Cancel button available next to Save
Save applies all pending citizen edits
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Right panel shows Save (blue, flex-1) and Cancel (gray) buttons when citizen is selected. App shows empty state initially. Save button validates schedule before persisting. No parity concerns.

expected_ui_claims: Schedule events sorted chronologically by time
Re-sorting visible after time field edit
Order automatically applied on every significant edit
reviews.open_ui_concerns: Schedule auto-sorts by parseTimeToMinutes() on every update call. Sort is applied immediately in handleUpdateScheduleEvent. No ordering concerns.
